Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff Amun-Re King'S Written Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA XLIV's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Amun-Re King'S Written Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions.

Defendant Mercy Housing of California XLIV's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Amun-Re King's Written Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions is OFF CALENDAR.

Good cause appearing and consistent with the 7/15/2025 request of the moving party, this motion is ordered off calendar.

THE PARTIES ARE ADVISED stacked discovery motions are strongly disfavored. Going forward, stacked motions will be ordered off calendar in favor of individual motions focused each on a single discovery vehicle (e.g., Frogs, SRogs, RFPs, RFAs, deposition notice) addressed to a single, specific party.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
